message:
🌱 Add linkerd: Grafana links not updated when leveraging external grafana mission (#1610)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "linkerd-4838-grafana-links-not-updated-when-leveraging-external-grafana", + "missionClass": "solution", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "linkerd: Grafana links not updated when leveraging external grafana", + "description": "Grafana links not updated when leveraging external grafana. This issue affects 6+ users.", + "type": "troubleshoot", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Identify linkerd troubleshoot symptoms", + "description": "Check for the issue in your linkerd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue." + }, + { + "title": "Review linkerd configuration", + "description": "Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd\n```\n### What is the issue?\nUsing the helm-chart I have specified following values:\n```yaml\nglobal:\n cniEnabled: true\n grafanaUrl: https://externalurl.com\nenforcedHostRegexp: '^linkerd\\.(int|qa|stagin|prod)*\\.io$'\ninstallNamespace: false\ngrafana:\n " + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for Grafana links not updated when leveraging external grafana", + "description": "Thats definitely a valid concern! I tried googling around, and could find any solution which allows grafana to allow both i.e proxied and normal. \n\nShould we instead provide an option, which makes the the dashboard redirect to the given `grafanaUrl` instead of proxy'ing? obviously, that imples that\n```yaml\nglobal:\n cniEnabled: true\n grafanaUrl: https://externalurl.com\nenforcedHostRegexp: '^linkerd\\.(int|qa|stagin|prod)*\\.io$'\ninstallNamespace: false\ngrafana:\n enabled: false\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Confirm Grafana links not updated when leveraging… is resolved", + "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd -n linkerd --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone." + } + ], + "resolution": { + "summary": "Thats definitely a valid concern! I tried googling around, and could find any solution which allows grafana to allow both i.e proxied and normal.", + "codeSnippets": [ + "global:\n cniEnabled: true\n grafanaUrl: https://externalurl.com\nenforcedHostRegexp: '^linkerd\\.(int|qa|stagin|prod)*\\.io$'\ninstallNamespace: false\ngrafana:\n enabled: false", + "\n  \n  \n  \n  \n  Linkerd\n  \n  \n  \n  \n     \n  \n   \n   \n  \n  \n   \n 
\n   \n 
\n   \n    " + ] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "linkerd", + "graduated", + "networking", + "troubleshoot" + ], + "cncfProjects": [ + "linkerd" + ], + "targetResourceKinds": [ + "Namespace", + "Service" + ], + "difficulty": "advanced", + "issueTypes": [ + "troubleshoot" + ], + "maturity": "graduated", + "sourceUrls": { + "issue": "https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2/issues/4838", + "repo": "https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2" + }, + "reactions": 6, + "comments": 12, + "synthesizedBy": "copilot" + }, + "prerequisites": { + "kubernetes": ">=1.24", + "tools": [ + "kubectl" + ], + "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:19:32.379Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
